name: performing-security-code-review
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill enables claude to conduct a security-focused code review using the security-agent plugin. it analyzes code for potential vulnerabilities like sql injection, xss, authentication flaws, and insecure dependencies. claude uses this skill wh...
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够使用专门插件执行安全代码审查。它能识别SQL注入、XSS等漏洞，并提供严重性评级和修复建议。

name: performing-security-testing
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Automate security vulnerability testing covering OWASP Top 10, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, and authentication issues.
Use when performing security assessments, penetration tests, or vulnerability scans.
Trigger with phrases like "scan for vulnerabilities", "test security", or "run penetration test".
description_zh: 该技能自动化执行应用程序和API的安全漏洞测试，覆盖OWASP Top 10等威胁（如SQL注入、XSS）。它执行扫描并生成包含严重性评级和修复建议的详细报告。

name: planning-disaster-recovery
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Use when you need to work with backup and recovery.
This skill provides backup automation and disaster recovery with comprehensive guidance and automation.
Trigger with phrases like "create backups", "automate backups",
or "implement disaster recovery".
description_zh: 该技能通过为不同基础设施生成配置和设置代码，帮助规划和实施灾难恢复程序。它根据RTO和RPO等特定要求自动化灾难恢复规划。

name: plugin-auditor
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Automatically audits claude code plugins for security vulnerabilities, best practices, claude.md compliance, and quality standards when user mentions audit plugin, security review, or best practices check. specific to claude-code-plugins repositor...
description_zh: 当用户提及“审计插件”或“安全检查”时，自动审核Claude Code插件的安全漏洞、最佳实践、仓库标准合规性和质量检查。

name: plugin-creator
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Automatically creates new claude code plugins with proper structure, validation, and marketplace integration when user mentions creating a plugin, new plugin, or plugin from template. specific to claude-code-plugins repository workflow.
description_zh: 此Claude技能专为claude-code-plugins仓库设计，能自动创建新的Claude Code插件，包括完整的目录结构、必需文件，并集成到市场目录中。

name: plugin-validator
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Automatically validates claude code plugin structure, schemas, and compliance when user mentions validate plugin, check plugin, or plugin errors. runs comprehensive validation specific to claude-code-plugins repository standards.
description_zh: 自动验证Claude Code插件是否符合仓库标准，检查结构、模式、前置元数据、权限、安全性和市场合规性，确保插件质量和正确性。

name: pre-commit
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: When setting up automated code quality checks on git commit. When project has .pre-commit-config.yaml. When implementing git hooks for formatting, linting, or validation. When creating prepare-commit-msg hooks to modify commit messages. When distributing a tool as a pre-commit hook.
description_zh: 一项用于使用 pre-commit 框架或其替代品 prek 来设置和管理 git hooks 的技能。它能在项目中自动化代码质量检查、格式化、代码规范检查以及提交信息的重写与验证。

name: preprocessing-data-with-automated-pipelines
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Automate data cleaning, transformation, and validation for ML tasks. Use when requesting "preprocess data", "clean data", "ETL pipeline", or "data transformation".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够构建自动化数据预处理和清洗管道，通过验证、转换和错误处理，为机器学习高效准备数据。

name: preserving-productive-tensions
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Recognize when disagreements reveal valuable context, preserve multiple valid approaches instead of forcing premature resolution
description_zh: 该技能帮助识别分歧何时揭示有价值的背景，并教导如何保留多种有效方法而非强制过早解决，以增强复杂情境下的决策能力。

name: processing-api-batches
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Process bulk API requests efficiently with batching, throttling, and parallel execution.
Use when processing bulk API operations efficiently.
Trigger with phrases like "process bulk requests", "batch API calls", or "handle batch operations".
description_zh: 该技能通过批处理、限流和并行执行高效处理批量API请求。它处理API设计、实现、测试和文档化，为生产环境提供批量操作解决方案。

name: processing-computer-vision-tasks
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Process images using object detection, classification, and segmentation. Use when requesting "analyze image", "object detection", "image classification", or "computer vision".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够利用计算机视觉技术（如目标检测、图像分类和分割）分析图像，从视觉内容中提取信息并识别物体。

name: profiling-application-performance
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill enables claude to profile application performance, analyzing cpu usage, memory consumption, and execution time. it is triggered when the user requests performance analysis, bottleneck identification, or optimization recommendations. the...
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够通过分析CPU使用率、内存消耗和执行时间来剖析应用性能，识别瓶颈并提供代码级优化建议。

name: prompt-optimization-claude-45
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Optimize CLAUDE.md files and Skills for Claude Code CLI. Use when reviewing, creating, or improving system prompts, CLAUDE.md configurations, or Skill files. Transforms negative instructions into positive patterns following Anthropic's official best practices.
description_zh: 该技能用于优化Claude Code CLI的CLAUDE.md文件和技能。它应用Anthropic的提示工程最佳实践，将负面指令转化为积极模式，确保具体性并改进结构。

name: providing-performance-optimization-advice
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Provide comprehensive prioritized performance optimization recommendations for frontend, backend, and infrastructure. Use when analyzing bottlenecks or seeking improvement strategies. Trigger with phrases like "optimize performance", "improve speed", or "performance recommendations".
description_zh: 该技能可分析软件项目的前端、后端和基础设施，识别性能瓶颈和反模式，提供优先级的、可操作的优化建议和实施路线图。

name: pulling-updates-from-skills-repository
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Sync local skills repository with upstream changes from obra/superpowers-skills
description_zh: 该技能自动化同步本地Claude技能仓库与官方上游更新，同时保留用户修改，处理包括暂存、合并和冲突解决在内的Git操作。

name: pypi-readme-creator
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: When creating a README for a Python package. When preparing a package for PyPI publication. When README renders incorrectly on PyPI. When choosing between README.md and README.rst. When running twine check and seeing rendering errors. When configuring readme field in pyproject.toml.
description_zh: 该技能帮助为Python包创建和验证专业的README文件，确保在PyPI等平台正确渲染，支持Markdown或reStructuredText格式，并提供内容指南。

name: python3-development
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: The model must use this skill when : 1. working within any python project. 2. Python CLI applications with Typer and Rich are mentioned by the user. 2. tasked with Python script writing or editing. 3. building CI scripts or tools. 4. Creating portable Python scripts with stdlib only. 5. planning out a python package design. 6. running any python script or test. 7. writing tests (unit, integration, e2e, validation) for a python script, package, or application. Reviewing Python code against best practices or for code smells. 8. The python command fails to run or errors, or the python3 command shows errors. 9. pre-commit or linting errors occur in python files. 10. Writing or editing python code  in a git repository.\n<hint>This skill provides : 1. the users preferred workflow patterns for test-driven development, feature addition, refactoring, debugging, and code review using modern Python 3.11+ patterns (including PEP 723 inline metadata, native generics, and type-safe async processing). 2. References to favored modules. 3. Working pyproject.toml configurations. 4. Linting and formatting configuration and troubleshooting. 5. Resource files that provide solutions to known errors and linting issues. 6. Project layouts the user prefers.</hint>
description_zh: 该技能提供全面的Python 3.11+开发支持，包括项目设置、测试驱动开发、调试、代码审查和CI/CD自动化，并参考现代库和最佳实践。

name: rate-limiting-apis
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Implement sophisticated rate limiting with sliding windows, token buckets, and quotas.
Use when protecting APIs from excessive requests.
Trigger with phrases like "add rate limiting", "limit API requests", or "implement rate limits".
description_zh: 该Claude技能帮助开发者实现包含滑动窗口和令牌桶的高级API限流。它指导API设计、实现、测试和文档生成，以构建生产就绪的API。

name: responding-to-security-incidents
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Guide security incident response, investigation, and remediation processes.
Use when you need to handle security breaches, classify incidents, develop response playbooks, gather forensic evidence, or coordinate remediation efforts.
Trigger with phrases like "security incident response", "ransomware attack response", "data breach investigation", "incident playbook", or "security forensics".
description_zh: 该技能指导用户完成安全事件响应，从分类到修复。它帮助创建响应手册、收集证据，并为数据泄露、勒索软件或DDoS攻击制定恢复计划。

name: routing-dex-trades
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Route trades across multiple DEXs to find optimal prices and minimize slippage.

Trigger with phrases like "find best price", "route trade", or "check DEX prices".
description_zh: 该Claude技能通过跨多个去中心化交易所路由加密货币交易，利用市场数据和区块链分析来寻找最优价格并减少滑点，以实现最佳执行。

name: running-chaos-tests
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Execute chaos engineering experiments to test system resilience.

Trigger with phrases like "run chaos tests", "test resilience", or "inject failures".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够设计和执行混沌工程实验，以测试系统韧性，利用工具模拟故障并验证恢复机制。

name: running-clustering-algorithms
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Execute clustering algorithms (K-means, DBSCAN, hierarchical) to identify data groups. Use when requesting "run clustering", "cluster analysis", or "group data points".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够在数据集上执行K均值、DBSCAN和层次聚类等算法，以识别数据组群、分析数据结构，并包括验证、指标计算和结果保存。

name: running-e2e-tests
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Execute end-to-end tests covering full user workflows across frontend and backend.

description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够使用Playwright、Cypress或Selenium等框架为Web应用生成端到端自动化测试，以模拟和验证登录、结账等真实用户流程。

name: running-integration-tests
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Execute integration tests validating component interactions and system integration.
Use when performing specialized testing.
Trigger with phrases like "run integration tests", "test integration", or "validate component interactions".

description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够创建和执行负载测试以进行性能验证，使用k6、JMeter等工具生成脚本来模拟流量并识别应用程序瓶颈。

name: running-mutation-tests
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Execute mutation testing to evaluate test suite effectiveness.

Trigger with phrases like "run mutation tests", "test the tests", or "validate test effectiveness".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够执行变异测试，通过引入代码变更并运行测试来评估测试套件的有效性，识别弱点并计算变异分数。

name: running-performance-tests
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Execute load testing, stress testing, and performance benchmarking.

Trigger with phrases like "run load tests", "test performance", or "benchmark the system".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够设计、执行和分析性能测试（负载、压力、峰值、耐力），以识别系统瓶颈并生成优化报告。

name: running-smoke-tests
author: BbgnsurfTech

Execute fast smoke tests validating critical functionality after deployment.

Trigger with phrases like "run smoke tests", "quick validation", or "test critical paths".

name: scanning-accessibility

Validate WCAG compliance and accessibility standards (ARIA, keyboard navigation).

author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Scan APIs for security vulnerabilities including injection, broken auth, and data exposure.

Trigger with phrases like "scan API security", "check for vulnerabilities", or "audit API security".

name: scanning-container-security
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Use when you need to work with security and compliance.

Trigger with phrases like "scan for vulnerabilities", "implement security controls",
or "audit security".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够使用Trivy和Snyk等工具对容器镜像和运行中的容器进行安全漏洞扫描，识别安全风险并为容器化应用提供修复建议。

name: scanning-database-security
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Use when you need to work with security and compliance.
This skill provides security scanning and vulnerability detection with comprehensive guidance and automation.
Trigger with phrases like "scan for vulnerabilities", "implement security controls",
or "audit security".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够使用专用插件执行自动化数据库安全扫描。它能识别弱密码、SQL注入等漏洞，提供OWASP合规性报告，并为PostgreSQL和MySQL数据库提供修复建议。

name: scanning-for-data-privacy-issues
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Scan for data privacy issues and sensitive information exposure. Use when reviewing data handling practices. Trigger with 'scan privacy issues', 'check sensitive data', or 'validate data protection'.
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够使用专用插件自动扫描代码和配置文件，识别潜在的数据隐私漏洞、敏感数据暴露、合规违规和其他隐私相关风险。

name: scanning-for-gdpr-compliance
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Scan for GDPR compliance issues in data handling and privacy practices. Use when ensuring EU data protection compliance. Trigger with 'scan GDPR compliance', 'check data privacy', or 'validate GDPR'.
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够扫描应用程序和数据系统，以识别GDPR合规性问题，利用专用插件评估数据保护、隐私权和同意管理方面的潜在违规风险。

name: scanning-for-secrets
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Scan for exposed secrets, API keys, and credentials in code. Use when auditing for secret leaks. Trigger with 'scan for secrets', 'find exposed keys', or 'check credentials'.
description_zh: 该技能通过模式匹配和熵分析扫描代码库，检测暴露的API密钥和密码等秘密，帮助在部署前识别和修复安全漏洞。

name: scanning-for-vulnerabilities
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill enables comprehensive vulnerability scanning using the vulnerability-scanner plugin. it identifies security vulnerabilities in code, dependencies, and configurations, including cve detection. use this skill when the user asks to scan fo...
description_zh: 该技能利用专用插件，自动扫描代码库、依赖项和配置中的安全漏洞，识别CVE等风险，并提供包含修复建议的详细报告。

name: scanning-for-xss-vulnerabilities
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill enables claude to automatically scan for xss (cross-site scripting) vulnerabilities in code. it is triggered when the user requests to "scan for xss vulnerabilities", "check for xss", or uses the command "/xss". the skill identifies ref...
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能自动扫描Web应用代码中的跨站脚本（XSS）漏洞。它识别反射型、存储型和DOM型XSS问题，分析代码上下文，并为安全审计和代码审查提供修复建议。

name: scanning-input-validation-practices
author: BbgnsurfTech

description_zh: 该技能扫描源代码以识别潜在的输入验证漏洞，如SQL注入和XSS，帮助开发人员在代码审查和安全审计期间保护应用程序安全。

name: scanning-market-movers
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Identify significant price movements and unusual volume across crypto markets.
Use when tracking significant price movements.
Trigger with phrases like "scan market movers", "check biggest gainers", or "find pumps".
description_zh: 该技能通过分析实时数据、链上指标和技术指标，识别加密货币市场的显著价格波动和异常交易量，以生成可操作的洞察。

name: setting-up-distributed-tracing
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill automates the setup of distributed tracing for microservices. it helps developers implement end-to-end request visibility by configuring context propagation, span creation, trace collection, and analysis. use this skill when the user re...
description_zh: 此技能自动化微服务分布式追踪的配置，实现端到端的请求可见性。它指导开发者实现上下文传播、跨度创建，并选择如Jaeger等追踪后端，用于监控和诊断性能问题。

name: setting-up-experiment-tracking
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Setup machine learning experiment tracking using MLflow or Weights & Biases. Configures environment and provides code for logging parameters, metrics, and artifacts. Use when asked to "setup experiment tracking" or "initialize MLflow".
description_zh: 该技能自动化机器学习实验跟踪的设置，使用MLflow或Weights & Biases等工具。它配置环境、初始化跟踪服务器，并提供记录参数、指标和产物的代码片段，以确保实验的可复现性。

name: setting-up-log-aggregation
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Use when setting up log aggregation solutions using ELK, Loki, or Splunk. Trigger with phrases like "setup log aggregation", "deploy ELK stack", "configure Loki", or "install Splunk". Generates production-ready configurations for data ingestion, processing, storage, and visualization with proper security and scalability.
description_zh: 该技能自动化设置和配置日志聚合系统（如ELK、Loki或Splunk）。它根据特定的基础设施需求，生成生产就绪的配置文件和部署代码。

name: setting-up-synthetic-monitoring
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Setup synthetic monitoring for proactive performance tracking including uptime checks, transaction monitoring, and API health. Use when implementing availability monitoring or tracking critical user journeys. Trigger with phrases like "setup synthetic monitoring", "monitor uptime", or "configure health checks".
description_zh: 该技能自动化应用程序的合成监控设置，通过配置可用性、事务和API监控以及警报和仪表板，实现主动的性能与可用性追踪。

name: sharing-skills
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Contribute skills back to upstream via branch and PR
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个通过Git分支和拉取请求向共享仓库贡献新技能的分步工作流程，包括先决条件、命令和故障排除提示。

name: simulating-flash-loans
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Simulate flash loan arbitrage strategies and profitability across DeFi protocols.
Use when performing crypto analysis.
Trigger with phrases like "analyze crypto", "check blockchain", or "monitor market".
description_zh: 此技能模拟闪电贷套利策略并分析跨DeFi协议的盈利能力。它获取加密货币市场和区块链数据，进行处理以生成洞察，并为加密货币分析制作综合报告。

name: skill-adapter
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Analyzes existing plugins to extract their capabilities, then adapts and applies those skills to the current task. Acts as a universal skill chameleon that learns from other plugins. Activates when you request "skill adapter" functionality.
description_zh: 该Claude技能分析现有插件以理解其功能，提取模式和方法，然后调整并应用这些学到的技能来解决用户当前的任务。

name: splitting-datasets
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Split datasets into training, validation, and testing sets for ML model development. Use when requesting "split dataset", "train-test split", or "data partitioning".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够自动将数据集分割为训练集、验证集和测试集，用于机器学习模型开发，处理数据分区和训练测试拆分等任务。

name: story-based-framing
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill should be used when describing patterns or anti-patterns for detection by LLM agents across any domain (code analysis, business processes, security audits, UX design, data quality, medical diagnosis, etc.). Uses narrative storytelling structure ("The Promise" → "The Betrayal" → "The Consequences" → "The Source") to achieve 70% faster pattern identification compared to checklist or formal specification approaches. Triggers when creating pattern descriptions for any systematic analysis, detection tasks, or when delegating pattern-finding to sub-agents.
description_zh: 一种使用故事结构（承诺、背叛、后果、根源）来描述模式和反模式的叙事技术，旨在帮助LLM智能体在不同领域中进行更快速、更有效的模式识别。

name: tdd-guide
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Comprehensive Test Driven Development guide for engineering subagents with multi-framework support, coverage analysis, and intelligent test generation
description_zh: 一个全面的测试驱动开发指南，为工程团队提供智能测试生成、覆盖率分析、框架集成以及跨多种语言和测试框架的TDD工作流支持。

name: tech-stack-evaluator
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Comprehensive technology stack evaluation and comparison tool with TCO analysis, security assessment, and intelligent recommendations for engineering teams
description_zh: 一个用于评估和比较技术栈的综合工具，通过总拥有成本分析、安全评估和迁移规划，为工程团队提供数据驱动的建议。

name: test-driven-development-tdd
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Write the test first, watch it fail, write minimal code to pass
description_zh: 一种严格的软件开发方法，要求在编写实现代码之前先编写测试，遵循红-绿-重构循环，以确保代码质量和行为正确性。

name: testing-anti-patterns
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Never test mock behavior. Never add test-only methods to production classes. Understand dependencies before mocking.
description_zh: 识别并防止常见测试反模式的技能，重点避免测试模拟行为、在生产代码中添加仅测试使用的方法以及不当的依赖模拟。

name: testing-browser-compatibility
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Test across multiple browsers and devices for cross-browser compatibility.
Use when ensuring cross-browser or device compatibility.
Trigger with phrases like "test browser compatibility", "check cross-browser", or "validate on browsers".
description_zh: 该技能使用BrowserStack和Playwright等工具自动化Web应用的跨浏览器兼容性测试。它在Chrome、Firefox、Safari和Edge上运行测试，识别特定于浏览器的错误，并生成包含截图的详细报告。

name: testing-load-balancers
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Validate load balancer behavior, failover, and traffic distribution.
Use when performing specialized testing.
Trigger with phrases like "test load balancer", "validate failover", or "check traffic distribution".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够测试负载均衡配置，包括验证流量分布、测试故障转移场景、验证粘性会话以及评估健康检查功能。

name: testing-mobile-apps
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Execute mobile app testing on iOS and Android devices/simulators.
Use when performing specialized testing.
Trigger with phrases like "test mobile app", "run iOS tests", or "validate Android functionality".
description_zh: 该技能使用 Appium、Detox、XCUITest 和 Espresso 等框架，为 iOS 和 Android 平台自动化移动应用测试。它能生成端到端测试、创建页面对象模型并配置模拟器或设备群。

name: testing-skills-with-subagents
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: RED-GREEN-REFACTOR for process documentation - baseline without skill, write addressing failures, iterate closing loopholes
description_zh: 一个使用测试驱动开发原则来测试Claude技能的技能。它指导创建压力场景、建立无技能基线，并迭代优化技能，以确保其在压力下有效且能抵御合理化借口。

name: testing-visual-regression
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Detect visual changes in UI components using screenshot comparison.
Use when detecting unintended UI changes or pixel differences.
Trigger with phrases like "test visual changes", "compare screenshots", or "detect UI regressions".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够使用Percy等工具对Web应用进行视觉回归测试。它捕获屏幕截图，与基线图像对比，识别意外UI变更，确保视觉一致性。

name: throttling-apis
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Manage API throttling policies to protect backend services from overload.
Use when controlling API request rates.
Trigger with phrases like "throttle API", "control request rate", or "add throttling".
description_zh: 该技能帮助设计、实施和管理API限流策略，以保护后端服务免受过载影响。它指导用户完成API结构规划、实现、添加速率限制等生产功能，以及全面的测试和文档编制。

name: toml-python
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: When reading or writing pyproject.toml or .toml config files in Python. When editing TOML while preserving comments and formatting. When designing configuration file format for a Python tool. When code uses tomlkit or tomllib. When implementing atomic config file updates.
description_zh: 该技能提供使用 tomlkit 库在 Python 中读写和操作 TOML 配置文件的专业知识，专注于在 Python 应用配置管理中保留注释和格式。

name: tracing-knowledge-lineages
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Understand how ideas evolved over time to find old solutions for new problems and avoid repeating past failures
description_zh: 该技能帮助追溯思想和方法的演变历史，以理解现有方案的成因，避免重蹈覆辙，并重新发现可能有价值的被弃用方案。

name: tracking-application-response-times
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Track and optimize application response times across API endpoints, database queries, and service calls. Use when monitoring performance or identifying bottlenecks. Trigger with phrases like "track response times", "monitor API performance", or "analyze latency".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够监控和优化应用程序性能，通过追踪API端点、数据库查询等服务的响应时间。它提供详细的百分位数指标，帮助识别性能瓶颈并确保服务水平。

name: tracking-crypto-derivatives
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Track futures, options, and perpetual swap positions with P&L calculations.
Use when tracking futures and options positions.
Trigger with phrases like "track derivatives", "check futures positions", or "analyze perps".
description_zh: 该技能追踪加密货币衍生品头寸，包括期货、期权和永续合约，通过连接市场数据API和区块链节点进行盈亏计算、分析头寸并生成报告。

name: tracking-crypto-portfolio
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Track multi-chain crypto portfolio with real-time valuations and performance metrics.
Use when managing multi-chain crypto holdings.
Trigger with phrases like "track my portfolio", "check holdings", or "analyze positions".
description_zh: 该技能通过聚合实时市场数据、分析链上指标并生成包含风险评估和技术指标的性能报告，来追踪多链加密货币投资组合。

name: tracking-crypto-prices
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Track real-time cryptocurrency prices across exchanges with historical data and alerts.
Use when monitoring real-time cryptocurrency prices.
Trigger with phrases like "check price", "track prices", or "get price alert".
description_zh: 该技能追踪跨交易所的实时加密货币价格与历史数据，提供技术分析、链上指标，并生成市场监控和交易洞察的警报。

name: tracking-model-versions
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill enables claude to track and manage ai/ml model versions using the model-versioning-tracker plugin. it should be used when the user asks to manage model versions, track model lineage, log model performance, or implement version control f...
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够通过专用插件管理AI/ML模型版本、跟踪谱系、记录性能并实施版本控制，促进模型部署的最佳实践和自动化工作流程。

name: tracking-regression-tests
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Track and manage regression test suites across releases.
Use when performing specialized testing.
Trigger with phrases like "track regressions", "manage regression suite", or "validate against baseline".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够跟踪和执行回归测试，确保新的代码更改不会破坏现有功能。它自动化测试识别、执行和结果分析，以维护软件稳定性。

name: tracking-resource-usage
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Track and optimize resource usage across application stack including CPU, memory, disk, and network I/O. Use when identifying bottlenecks or optimizing costs. Trigger with phrases like "track resource usage", "monitor CPU and memory", or "optimize resource allocation".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够监控和优化应用程序的资源使用，包括CPU、内存和I/O。它能识别性能瓶颈、分析消耗模式，并提供成本优化和基础设施规模调整的建议。

name: tracking-service-reliability
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Define and track SLAs, SLIs, and SLOs for service reliability including availability, latency, and error rates. Use when establishing reliability targets or monitoring service health. Trigger with phrases like "define SLOs", "track SLI metrics", or "calculate error budget".
description_zh: 该技能帮助定义和追踪服务可靠性指标，如SLA、SLI和SLO。它指导用户设定性能目标、监控服务表现并管理错误预算，以提升运营健康度。

name: tracking-token-launches
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Monitor new token launches, IDOs, and fair launches with contract verification.
Use when discovering new token launches.
Trigger with phrases like "track launches", "find new tokens", or "monitor IDOs".
description_zh: 此Claude技能通过检索和分析区块链与市场数据，监控新的加密货币代币发行、IDO和公平启动，生成包含洞察与风险指标的综合报告。

name: training-machine-learning-models
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Train machine learning models with automated workflows. Analyzes datasets, selects model types (classification, regression), configures parameters, trains with cross-validation, and saves model artifacts. Use when asked to "train model" or "evalua...
description_zh: 该技能可自动化训练机器学习模型，包括分析数据集、选择模型类型、配置参数、进行交叉验证训练、评估性能并保存训练好的模型。

name: tuning-hyperparameters
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Optimize machine learning model hyperparameters using grid search, random search, or Bayesian optimization. Finds best parameter configurations to maximize performance. Use when asked to "tune hyperparameters" or "optimize model".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够通过网格搜索、随机搜索或贝叶斯优化等方法，自动搜索最佳超参数配置，以优化机器学习模型的性能。

name: uv
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Expert guidance for Astral's uv - an extremely fast Python package and project manager. Use when working with Python projects, managing dependencies, creating scripts with PEP 723 metadata, installing tools, managing Python versions, or configuring package indexes. Covers project initialization, dependency management, virtual environments, tool installation, workspace configuration, CI/CD integration, and migration from pip/poetry.
description_zh: 提供关于 uv（一个用 Rust 编写的极速 Python 包和项目管理器）的专家指导。涵盖项目设置、依赖管理、虚拟环境、工具安装以及从其他 Python 工具迁移。

name: validating-ai-ethics-and-fairness
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Validate AI/ML models and datasets for bias, fairness, and ethical concerns.
Use when auditing AI systems for ethical compliance, fairness assessment, or bias detection.
Trigger with phrases like "evaluate model fairness", "check for bias", or "validate AI ethics".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够评估AI/ML模型和数据集的伦理影响与公平性。它能检测偏见、生成报告并提供缓解建议，以确保负责任的AI开发和部署。

name: validating-api-contracts
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Validate API contracts using consumer-driven contract testing (Pact, Spring Cloud Contract).
Use when performing specialized testing.
Trigger with phrases like "validate API contract", "run contract tests", or "check consumer contracts".
description_zh: 该技能使用Pact进行消费者驱动的契约测试和OpenAPI验证来验证API契约。它能生成契约测试、检查API合规性并识别破坏性变更，确保提供者与消费者之间的兼容性。

name: validating-api-responses
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Validate API responses against schemas to ensure contract compliance and data integrity.
Use when ensuring API response correctness.
Trigger with phrases like "validate responses", "check API responses", or "verify response format".
description_zh: 该技能根据模式验证API响应，以确保契约合规性和数据完整性。它指导设计、实现、测试和记录生产就绪的API，并提供适当的错误处理和安全性功能。

name: validating-api-schemas
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Validate API schemas against OpenAPI, JSON Schema, and GraphQL specifications.
Use when validating API schemas and contracts.
Trigger with phrases like "validate API schema", "check OpenAPI spec", or "verify schema".
description_zh: 该技能根据OpenAPI、JSON Schema和GraphQL规范验证API架构。它帮助设计、实现、测试和记录具备验证、认证和错误处理的生产级API。

name: validating-authentication-implementations
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Validate authentication mechanisms for security weaknesses and compliance. Use when reviewing login systems or auth flows. Trigger with 'validate authentication', 'check auth security', or 'review login'.
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够根据安全最佳实践验证身份验证实现。它分析JWT、OAuth和会话等方法，以识别漏洞并提供改进建议。

name: validating-cors-policies
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Validate CORS policies for security issues and misconfigurations. Use when reviewing cross-origin resource sharing. Trigger with 'validate CORS', 'check CORS policy', or 'review cross-origin'.
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够验证跨源资源共享（CORS）策略，分析配置以识别安全漏洞，确保正确实施，从而保护Web应用程序安全。

name: validating-csrf-protection
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Validate CSRF protection implementations for security gaps. Use when reviewing form security or state-changing operations. Trigger with 'validate CSRF', 'check CSRF protection', or 'review token security'.
description_zh: 该技能通过分析令牌、Cookie等保护机制，帮助识别和验证Web应用中的跨站请求伪造（CSRF）漏洞，并提供漏洞报告及修复建议。

name: validating-database-integrity
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Use when you need to ensure database integrity through comprehensive data validation.
This skill validates data types, ranges, formats, referential integrity, and business rules.
Trigger with phrases like "validate database data", "implement data validation rules",
"enforce data integrity constraints", or "validate data formats".
description_zh: 该技能使用数据验证引擎插件自动执行数据库完整性规则。它验证数据类型、格式、范围和业务规则，以确保数据质量并防止无效数据输入。

name: validating-pci-dss-compliance
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Validate PCI-DSS compliance for payment card data security. Use when auditing payment systems. Trigger with 'validate PCI-DSS', 'check payment security', or 'audit card data'.
description_zh: 该技能使用专用插件自动扫描代码库和基础设施配置，以检查其是否符合支付卡行业数据安全标准（PCI DSS），识别漏洞并提供修复建议。

name: validating-performance-budgets
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Validate application performance against defined budgets to identify regressions early. Use when checking page load times, bundle sizes, or API response times against thresholds. Trigger with phrases like "validate performance budget", "check performance metrics", or "detect performance regression".
description_zh: 此技能使Claude能够根据预定义的预算（如页面加载时间、包大小）验证应用程序性能。它能识别性能回归，尤其适用于将性能检查集成到CI/CD管道中以防止性能下降。

name: validator-expert
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Validate production readiness of Vertex AI Agent Engine deployments across security, monitoring, performance, compliance, and best practices. Generates weighted scores (0-100%) with actionable recommendations. Use when asked to "validate deploymen...
description_zh: 该技能用于验证Vertex AI Agent Engine部署的生产就绪性。它检查安全性、监控、性能和合规性，生成加权分数和可操作建议。

name: verification-gate
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Enforce mandatory pre-action verification checkpoints to prevent pattern-matching from overriding explicit reasoning. Use this skill when about to execute implementation actions (Bash, Write, Edit, MultiEdit) to verify hypothesis-action alignment. Blocks execution when hypothesis unverified or action targets different system than hypothesis identified. Critical for preventing cognitive dissonance where correct diagnosis leads to wrong implementation.
description_zh: 一个强制验证技能，在执行实施操作前强制执行检查点。它确保操作与已验证的假设保持一致，以防止技术工作流中的模式匹配错误和认知失调。

name: version-bumper
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Automatically handles semantic version updates across plugin.json and marketplace catalog when user mentions version bump, update version, or release. ensures version consistency in claude-code-plugins repository.
description_zh: 自动管理Claude Code插件的语义化版本更新，确保在claude-code-plugins仓库工作流中plugin.json、市场目录和git标签的版本一致性。

name: versioning-apis
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Manage API versions with backward compatibility, deprecation notices, and migration paths.
Use when managing API versions and backward compatibility.
Trigger with phrases like "version the API", "manage API versions", or "handle API versioning".
description_zh: 该技能帮助开发者管理API版本，确保向后兼容性，提供弃用通知和迁移路径。它为设计、实现、测试和文档化生产级API提供结构化指导。

name: vertex-agent-builder
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Build and deploy production-ready generative AI agents using Vertex AI, Gemini models, and Google Cloud infrastructure with RAG, function calling, and multi-modal capabilities
description_zh: 该技能用于使用Google Cloud的Vertex AI平台和Gemini模型构建和部署生产就绪的生成式AI智能体，支持RAG、函数调用和多模态功能。

name: vertex-ai-media-master
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Automatic activation for all google vertex ai multimodal operations - Use when appropriate context detected. Trigger with relevant phrases based on skill purpose.
description_zh: 该技能自动激活谷歌Vertex AI多模态操作，用于视频处理、音频生成、图像创建和营销活动自动化。

name: vertex-engine-inspector
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Inspect and validate Vertex AI Agent Engine deployments including Code Execution Sandbox, Memory Bank, A2A protocol compliance, and security posture. Generates production readiness scores. Use when asked to "inspect agent engine" or "validate depl...
description_zh: Vertex AI Agent Engine 部署的专家检查工具。验证运行时配置、安全状况、A2A协议合规性，并为AI智能体生成生产就绪度评分。

name: vertex-infra-expert
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Use when provisioning Vertex AI infrastructure with Terraform. Trigger with phrases like "vertex ai terraform", "deploy gemini terraform", "model garden infrastructure", "vertex ai endpoints terraform", or "vector search terraform". Provisions Model Garden models, Gemini endpoints, vector search indices, ML pipelines, and production AI services with encryption and auto-scaling.
description_zh: 一个用于配置和管理 Google Vertex AI 服务的 Terraform 基础设施专家，包括 Model Garden、Gemini 端点、向量搜索索引和生产机器学习流水线。

name: when-stuck-problem-solving-dispatch
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Dispatch to the right problem-solving technique based on how you're stuck
description_zh: 一个决策树工具，用于诊断你遇到的具体障碍类型，并指引你使用最合适的问题解决技巧（如简化或逆向思维）来克服它。

name: writing-plans
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Create detailed implementation plans with bite-sized tasks for engineers with zero codebase context
description_zh: 为软件功能创建详细的、分步的实施计划，将任务分解为包含精确文件路径、代码片段和命令的分钟级操作，以指导缺乏上下文的开发人员。

name: writing-skills
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: TDD for process documentation - test with subagents before writing, iterate until bulletproof
description_zh: 一种使用测试驱动开发原则创建健壮流程文档的方法论。它涉及在编写前使用子代理进行测试，迭代直到文档无懈可击且代理行为可靠合规。

name: xdg-base-directory
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: When an application needs to store config, data, cache, or state files. When designing where user-specific files should live. When code writes to ~/.appname or hardcoded home paths. When implementing cross-platform file storage with platformdirs.
description_zh: 该技能实现XDG基础目录规范，用于跨平台标准化文件存储，处理配置、数据、缓存和状态文件在用户特定和系统目录中的存放。

name: test-delete-skill
author: BerriAI
description: A test skill created specifically for deletion testing

name: test-skill
author: BerriAI
description: A minimal test skill for API testing

name: test-skill-litellm
author: BerriAI
description: A test skill created by LiteLLM automated tests

name: audit-dependencies
author: BerryKuipers
description: Run npm audit to scan for security vulnerabilities and check for outdated packages. Returns structured output with vulnerability counts by severity (critical/high/moderate/low), affected packages, and recommended updates. Used for security audits and maintenance.

name: check-existing-pr
author: BerryKuipers
description: Check if pull request already exists for current branch to support workflow resumption and prevent duplicate PR creation

name: commit-with-validation
author: BerryKuipers
description: Create single atomic commit with proper message format, issue linking, and pre-commit hook validation for WescoBar workflows
